chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1874 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of main case 11-04-2025 Mr. Imtiaz Ali Abbasi, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ashfaque Hussain Abro, Assistant Attorney General. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional A.G a/w Muhammad Akram DSP on behalf of DIGP, Sukkur and Manzoor Ali, DSP, Shaheed Benazirabad. **** Today, comments have been filed on behalf of DIGP, Hyderabad Range as well as Home Department, Government of Sindh, taken on record and copies whereof are provided to counsel for the petitioner. In both statements, it is submitted that name of the petitioner is not extended to remain in 4th Schedule and the earlier period has been expired on 24.05.2024. Even it is made clear in the statement of Home Department, Government of Sindh that no further order has been issued after such expiry. Under the circumstances, counsel for the petitioner being satisfied seeks disposal of instant petition, which is accordingly disposed of as above. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
